title: ArkAI — A multi-market AI trading prototype (options, prediction markets, spot & perps)
author: bestvape
selftext:
Hey everyone,

Wanted to share a quick preview of something I’ve been building.

This is ArkAI, a prototype that connects options markets(deribit), prediction markets(polymarket), and spot/perpetual exchanges(binance & hyperliquid) into one mcp server that any ai agent can consume.

The goal is to provide ai with visibility of markets, your portfolio & the ability to execute trades.   
  
It's quick and easy to use it with chatgpt & claude as a copilot(they don't allow trading) and then it can be plugged into agents to automate aspects of your process.  
  
Some interesting observations when playing around with it:  
 \-It make options more accessible. It helped me put on and manage a downside btc hedge which saved my backside in the last few weeks.  
 \-Prediction markets seem to be its sweet spot. Events, language, news & probabilities.   
 \-It can find opportunities across different markets and venues that you would never even think of.  
  
Here’s a short demo video showing how it works. 

Would love to hear your thoughts or feedback on what features or use-cases you’d find most useful.

Thanks for checking it out!
